description_long: This object is a sleek, modern computer monitor with a large, flat display framed by a thin, black bezel. The front features a vibrant screen with a subtle gradient background, and a small, centered Apple logo beneath the display. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, angular stand made of metallic material, which connects to the back panel and provides stability. The rear of the monitor is smooth and minimalist, with another Apple logo prominently displayed in the center. A separate, matching keyboard is positioned in front of the monitor, sharing the same metallic and minimalist design language. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and characteristic of contemporary all-in-one desktop computers.
description: A modern, slim computer monitor with a black bezel, metallic stand, and matching keyboard, featuring Apple logos on both the front and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display, thin black bezel, Apple logo below the screen, and the matching keyboard in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile, angular metallic stand, and the flat keyboard placed in front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth metallic back panel, central Apple logo, and the robust stand attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thinness of the monitor, the angled stand, and the keyboard's alignment.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a smooth, matte finish with slightly rounded corners, providing a modern and minimalistic frame around the display.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, angular pedestal made of metallic material, with a flat base and a single, sturdy support arm connecting to the back of the monitor. It appears rigid and non-adjustable.
attribute_button_placement: A single power button is implied on the lower right rear panel, but no other physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or stand.
attribute_brand_logo: An Apple logo is visible on the center bottom bezel of the front and another on the center of the rear panel, both in a contrasting dark color.
